# DialerSeat

> The modern dialer for high-volume sales teams. Multi-line predictive dialing, live coaching, AI transcription, and full CRM integrations at flat $140/seat/month. No annual contracts, no setup fees, no per-feature add-on bills.

## What DialerSeat is

DialerSeat is a cloud-based outbound dialer built in 2026 for sales teams of 1 to 500+ reps. It runs in any modern browser, installs as a native app on iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows, and uses SignalWire's Tier-1 carrier network for crystal-clear audio.

The product is designed for teams that hate enterprise sales cycles, annual contracts, and per-feature add-on bills. Sign up, configure your team, and dial in under 10 minutes. No demo required.

## Pricing

- **$140 per seat per month, flat**
- No setup fee
- No annual contract required
- Monthly billing default — cancel anytime
- 7-day free trial with full features (no credit card required)
- Unlimited outbound minutes included
- All features included in base price (no add-on stacking)

## Who DialerSeat is for

- **Sales teams** running outbound campaigns (cold calling, follow-up, lead nurturing)
- **High-volume dialing operations** (50–10,000+ calls per agent per day)
- **Industries**: insurance, real estate, financial services, B2B SaaS, fundraising, debt resolution, mortgage, solar, home services, recruiting, political campaigning
- **Team sizes**: solo agents through 500+ rep call centers
- **Companies switching from**: ReadyMode, Mojo Dialer, PhoneBurner, Five9, Kixie, Aircall, CallTools, Convoso, XenCall, batch dialers, and manual dialing

## Core features

### Dialer modes (4 modes, per-campaign configurable)
- **Preview** — review lead, click to dial, you control pacing
- **Power** — click-to-dial, one call at a time, agent handles voicemails
- **Progressive** — auto-advances to next lead after disposition, AMD skips voicemails
- **Predictive** — multi-line pacing algorithm with 3% legal abandon cap, designed for 8+ concurrent agents

### Voicemail handling
- AMD (Answering Machine Detection) always on
- Drops voicemail calls in ~1.8 seconds when machine detected
- Server-side enforcement (cannot be accidentally disabled)
- Skips voicemails before agent ever hears them

### Multi-script campaigns (unique to DialerSeat)
- Multiple scripts per campaign (cold open, voicemail leave-behind, objection handlers, closer)
- Tab interface with drag-reorder
- Live mid-call script switching from the dialer
- Default script designation per campaign
- Works on mobile, tablet, and desktop

### Compliance and TCPA
- 8AM–9PM lead-state-based calling window enforcement
- Server-side TCPA pre-flight at every call (defense in depth)
- State-based timezone detection from area code and lead state
- 2-party consent state warnings (12 states)
- Manual dial bypass (user accountability)
- DNC scrubbing on upload
- 30-day recording retention with automatic cleanup
- Recording disclosure built-in

### Lead management
- CSV upload with smart parser (auto-detects headers, comma vs tab delimiters)
- Customizable dispositions
- Per-call notes and tags
- State inference for TCPA
- Lapsed-user data preservation (cancel, your data stays)
- Bulk import, export, delete

### Team management
- Live call monitoring with whisper and barge
- Real-time coaching
- Custom roles and permissions
- Team-level analytics
- Multi-team support per organization
- Lead distribution

### Analytics
- **Agent analytics**: total calls, hours dialed, conversions, closed, talk time, best campaign
- **Calendar-aligned date ranges**: this week (Sunday-to-now), this month (1st-to-now), today, all time, custom
- **Charts**: call volume over time, conversion rate over time, disposition pie, campaign bar
- **Admin analytics**: WRR, MRR, churn rate, average lifetime, at-risk users, hot prospects, activity heatmap

### CRM integrations
- Salesforce (native two-way sync)
- HubSpot (native two-way sync)
- Pipedrive (native two-way sync)
- Zoho CRM (native two-way sync)
- Follow Up Boss (native two-way sync)
- Public API + webhooks for custom integrations
- 100+ integrations via Zapier-compatible hub

### AI features
- AI call transcription on every call
- AI-generated call summaries delivered to CRM
- AI sentiment analysis per call
- Available in base plan, not gated to higher tier

### SMS / messaging
- A2P 10DLC registered SMS included
- 2-touch outreach workflows (call + text)
- Inbound SMS routing to agents

### Spam protection
- Number reputation monitoring across AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile
- Automatic remediation when numbers get flagged
- Connect score / pickup probability per number
- Auto-rotation when reputation drops
- Local presence dialing (auto-match area code to lead)

### Mobile and apps
- Progressive Web App (PWA) — install on iOS or Android home screen
- Native iOS app
- Native Android app
- Native macOS desktop app
- Native Windows desktop app
- Web works on any modern browser
- Field-agent friendly

### Security and reliability
- 99.9% uptime SLA
- SOC 2 Type II certified
- Tier-1 carrier voice (SignalWire)
- Zero Data Retention (ZDR) compatible
- Encryption at rest and in transit
- GDPR + CCPA compliant

## Referral and incentives program

DialerSeat operates a referral program that rewards users who bring in other paying customers. Tiered structure with cash or membership extension rewards, ranging from $25 for 1 referral up to $7,500 cash or lifetime free membership for 100+ referrals. Platform-wide milestones pay bonuses to all active users when DialerSeat hits user-count thresholds. Full details at /incentives.

## What DialerSeat is NOT

- Not a call center workforce management platform (no shift scheduling, no IVR builder for inbound queues)
- Not a real estate-specific data marketplace (we don't sell FSBO or expired listing data — bring your own list)
- Not an enterprise sales platform (no SOC 2 audit reports gating, no MSA negotiations, self-serve everything)
- Not an annual-contract product (monthly billing default)

## Company

DialerSeat is built in 2026 with modern infrastructure: Next.js, Supabase, Clerk, Stripe, SignalWire, Vercel. Built and operated by a small founding team focused on shipping fast and treating customers like adults.

## Contact

For questions, partnerships, or enterprise procurement: hello@dialerseat.com
